name: Chilled Fillet of Beef with Sour Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 Leek, white part only, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the beef with salt and pepper.
2. Dot with 2 tablespoons of butter.
3. Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter in a small roasting pan.
4. Add carrot, leek, and celery. Saute over low heat for 8 minutes.
5. Place the beef in the pan. Bake in a preheated oven at 500°F (260°C) for 25 minutes.
6. Cool in the pan juices for 1 hour.
7. In a medium skillet, heat oil and garlic. Cook for 1 minute.
8. Add bacon. Saute until barely crisp. Drain on paper towels.
9. Drain all but 3 tablespoons of drippings.
10. Add mushrooms. Cook over moderate heat for 3 to 5 minutes. Remove and drain.
11. Place the cooled meat on a cutting board, pouring pan juices into a bowl.
12. Add the remaining ingredients to the pan juices, blending well.
13. Add bacon and mushrooms.
14. Taste and adjust seasoning.
15. Cut a 1-inch wide and 1-inch deep wedge along the top length of the beef.
16. Remove the long triangular wedge.
17. Spoon the stuffing evenly into the cavity, filling with about 3 tablespoons of stuffing.
18. Replace the wedge.
19. Chill.
20. To serve, cut the beef into 3/4-inch slices. Accompany with remaining stuffing. Serves 6 to 8.
